ground_truth.description: The positional arguments to_sha and from_sha are swapped in the git diff command. The original order was 'from_sha, to_sha' but the new code passes 'to_sha, from_sha', which reverses the diff direction. This produces the inverse of the intended changeset — additions appear as deletions and vice versa.
The --diff-filter flag excludes Type-change (T) files by default. While rare, symlink-to-file type changes would be silently dropped from the results.
